title: fix(openai): extract reasoning_content from DeepSeek streaming responses
body_text:
## Summary

Extract `reasoning_content` from delta in `_convert_delta_to_message_chunk` to make DeepSeek's thinking process available in `additional_kwargs`.

## Changes

- Added extraction of `reasoning_content` from delta in `libs/partners/openai/langchain_openai/chat_models/base.py`

## Testing

Verified the fix works with DeepSeek `deepseek-reasoner` model.

## Related Issue

Fixes #35516

entities.name: additional_kwargs
entities.description: A dictionary for storing extra keyword arguments or metadata in message chunks.

entities.description: A library for integrating with OpenAI and similar models.

extracted_data.summary: This issue describes extracting `reasoning_content` from DeepSeek streaming responses within `_convert_delta_to_message_chunk` in `langchain_openai` to make it available in `additional_kwargs`, thereby fixing `Issue #35516` and improving compatibility with the `deepseek-reasoner` model.
